Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Compelling Further Responses To Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions And Statement Of Items In Dispute
Off Calendar Jul-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT SEB CONSTRUCTION INCORPORATED'S Motion Compelling Further Responses To Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is Granted. Defendant is entitled to production of the documents covered by categories 2, 4, 5, 6, 7 and 8 for the time period October 2009 to the Present. Plaintiff must produce those documents within 15 days. The court did not award sanctions. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
